title: dalbergia candenatensis
intro: Dalbergia candenatensis, also known as the Candénat tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia candenatensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
